summary: Stripe Connect Phase 2 (Express Onboarding) testing completed. All 12 backend tests pass. All frontend UI elements verified. The Connect onboarding is running in DEV MODE (simulated active accounts).

backend: POST /api/connect/onboard creates simulated active Connect account (dev mode)
GET /api/connect/status returns full details (connect_status, details_submitted, charges_enabled, payouts_enabled, requirements)
POST /api/connect/dashboard returns dev dashboard URL for active accounts
can_payout logic correct (requires balance >= 500 AND status == active)
POST /api/webhooks/stripe endpoint exists (returns 400 for invalid signature)
frontend: Settings page shows 5 cards (Profil, Workspace, Intégrations, Paiement, Wallet)
Wallet card in Settings links to /settings/wallet
WalletPage loads and displays balance cards (available + pending)
WalletPage shows Connect status card with 'Compte vérifié' label and 'active' badge
WalletPage shows transaction history section with empty state
WalletPage shows payout eligibility info (minimum 5€ message)
Stripe Dashboard button visible for active accounts
Back button navigates to Settings page

verified_features.connect_onboard: POST /api/connect/onboard - Creates simulated active account in dev mode, idempotent
verified_features.connect_status: GET /api/connect/status - Returns full status details including charges_enabled, payouts_enabled
verified_features.connect_dashboard: POST /api/connect/dashboard - Returns dev dashboard URL for active accounts
verified_features.webhook_handlers: account.updated and account.application.deauthorized handlers exist in webhooks.py (lines 138-147)

mocked_apis.stripe_connect_onboarding: MOCKED - Stripe Connect Express onboarding is simulated in dev mode (no real Stripe Connect account creation). Returns '[DEV MODE] Compte simulé comme actif'

seed_data_creation: None - Connect account auto-created via dev mode onboarding
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stripe Connect Phase 2 implemented. (1) POST /api/connect/onboard creates simulated active account in dev mode, (2) GET /api/connect/status returns full details, (3) POST /api/connect/dashboard returns dev dashboard URL, (4) Webhook handlers for account.updated and account.application.deauthorized exist in webhooks.py, (5) WalletPage at /settings/wallet shows balance cards, connect status, and transaction history, (6) Settings page has 5 cards including Wallet. All tests pass. MOCKED: Stripe Connect onboarding is simulated (dev mode).
